name: Welsh Rarebit III
recipeIngredient: 12 Toast triangles (made from 6 slices of bread)
6 slices of ham cut into triangles, the size of bread triangles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 1 ½-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, beat eggs until well blended. Stir in all remaining ingredients except toast and ham.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 6 to 7 minutes or until cheese has melted and mixture has thickened. Stir the mixture about once every minute.
3. Beat the mixture with a rotary beater or electric mixer until very smooth.
4. Spoon the rarebit over 2 toast triangles that have been topped with ham triangles.
